mapper.sql: id, user_id, event_id, ticket_type_id, price, status, request_id, created_at, updated_at, paid_at, expire_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (id, user_id, event_id, ticket_type_id, price, status, request_id, created_at, updated_at, expire_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{eventId}, #{ticketTypeId}, #{price}, #{status}, #{requestId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{expireAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId}
